overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through a medieval fantasy town at night. The scene features cobblestone streets illuminated by torchlight, stone architecture, and NPCs carrying torches. The atmosphere is dark and atmospheric with warm artificial lighting contrasting against the cool night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: medieval stone bridge with market stalls

events.description: Geralt passes by NPCs carrying torches on the right side of the bridge

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the stone bridge, approaching the town gate ahead

notable_agents.action: townsman holding a torch, walking toward the camera

entered.detail: low stone wall with crenellations running along the left side of the walkway
burning fire pit mounted on the stone wall providing warm orange light
wooden vendor stall with red awning and yellow sacks visible
large stone archway entrance to the inner town visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a medieval stone bridge at night, passing by townspeople carrying torches. The path is lined with a stone parapet on the left and wooden market stalls on the right, leading toward a large stone archway gate in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: town gate passage transitioning to inner streets

events.description: Geralt passes through the large stone archway gate into the inner town

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking through the stone archway gate, transitioning from the bridge to the inner town streets

notable_agents.action: guard in armor holding a torch, standing watch near the gate

entered.detail: stone staircase ascending along the right side of the street
medieval half-timbered house with dark wooden beams

segments.scene_description: Geralt passes through the imposing stone archway gate into the inner town. The scene transitions from the open bridge to a more enclosed street with timber-framed buildings and a stone staircase visible on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: uphill cobblestone street with residential buildings

events.description: path begins ascending uphill between stone walls and buildings

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking uphill on the cobblestone street, passing between timber houses and stone walls

notable_agents.action: guard in red armor standing near a wall-mounted torch

entered.detail: planters with red flowers lining the left side of the path
tall stone retaining wall with wooden fence on top

segments.scene_description: Geralt ascends a steep cobblestone street lined with red flower boxes on the left and a stone wall on the right. The street is narrower here, passing between medieval timber-framed buildings, with a guard standing watch near a torch.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper town square with manor house

events.description: street opens into a wider town square with a large timber manor house

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking through the open town square, approaching a large timber-framed manor house on the left

notable_agents.action: guard in armor standing near the manor entrance

entered.detail: large two-story timber-framed manor house with steep roof and multiple windows
wider open cobblestone area with space between buildings
wooden barricade and brazier marking a checkpoint

segments.scene_description: The street opens into a wider town square dominated by a large timber-framed manor house on the left. Guards stand watch near braziers as Geralt walks through this more open area of the upper town, with the path continuing toward distant buildings.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an open bridge into the increasingly dense and elevated architecture of a medieval town at night. It begins with Geralt walking along a stone bridge past torch-bearing townspeople and market stalls, moving steadily toward a large stone archway gate. As he passes through the imposing gate, the environment shifts from the open bridge to an enclosed street characterized by timber-framed buildings and a stone staircase. The path then narrows and ascends a steep cobblestone street lined with red flower boxes and guarded by a sentry before finally opening into a wide town square dominated by a large timber-framed manor house and glowing braziers.
